title: AIDA marketing model
citation: AIDA model: Attention, Interest, Desire, Action; use as a marketing-stage framework, not as direct support for every visual cue.
notes: Use only as a customer-side stage skeleton.

title: OpenStax Principles of Marketing: The Consumer Purchasing Decision Process
citation: OpenStax, Principles of Marketing, Section 3.3, The Consumer Purchasing Decision Process.
notes: Use for customer buying-stage and evaluation behavior support; do not ingest the textbook into model training.

title: OpenStax Principles of Marketing: Factors That Influence Consumer Buying Behavior
citation: OpenStax, Principles of Marketing, Section 3.2, Factors That Influence Consumer Buying Behavior.
notes: Use for persona and companion-influence interpretation; do not ingest the textbook into model training.

title: OpenStax Principles of Marketing: Steps in the Personal Selling Process
citation: OpenStax, Principles of Marketing, Section 15.3, Steps in the Personal Selling Process.
notes: Use for sales-action timing and low-pressure intervention support; do not ingest the textbook into model training.

title: SPIN Selling
notes: Use as citation-level support for consultative questioning; do not crawl or store book text.

title: Business Communication for Success: Nonverbal Strategies for Success
citation: Business Communication for Success, Section 11.5, Nonverbal Strategies for Success with Your Audience.
notes: Use only for general business-communication support for nonverbal cue interpretation; not direct retail-sales outcome evidence.
